description: Activation tests for the oss-ready skill — verifies correct triggering on open-source readiness queries across all 5 features, and non-triggering on unrelated requests.

evals.input: oss-ready
evals.reason: Exact skill name should trigger full audit

evals.input: Is this repo open source ready?
evals.reason: Natural language variant of skill name

evals.input: Can you audit this repo before I push it to public GitHub?
evals.reason: Audit + public context should trigger full mode

evals.input: Pre-publish check before I open source this project
evals.reason: Pre-publish check is a listed full audit trigger

evals.input: Is this safe to open source?
evals.reason: Direct question about open source safety

evals.input: Is this ready for GitHub public?
evals.reason: Ready for GitHub public is a listed full trigger

evals.input: Check the open source readiness of this project
evals.reason: Explicit readiness check

evals.input: I want to make this repo public, can you check it first?
evals.reason: Making repo public implies full audit

evals.input: full audit
evals.reason: Explicit full audit trigger

evals.input: Run a PII scan on this codebase
evals.reason: PII scan triggers security mode

evals.input: Check this repo for leaked secrets
evals.reason: Secrets scan triggers security mode

evals.input: credential scan on this project
evals.reason: Credential scan is a security mode trigger

evals.input: Check the repo health of this project
evals.reason: Repo health is a direct trigger for scorecard mode

evals.input: Give me a scorecard for this repository
evals.reason: Scorecard triggers health mode

evals.input: How's the community health of this repo?
evals.reason: Community health is a listed health trigger

evals.input: health check
evals.reason: Direct health check trigger

evals.input: Should I open source this project?
evals.reason: Should I open source is an explicit coach trigger

evals.input: oss coach
evals.reason: Direct oss coach keyword

evals.input: Is this worth open sourcing?
evals.reason: Worth open sourcing triggers coach mode

evals.input: Should I make this project public?
evals.reason: Making public triggers coach for guidance

evals.input: Audit my README
evals.reason: README audit is a direct trigger

evals.input: Check my README
evals.reason: Check my readme is a listed trigger

evals.input: What's my README score?
evals.reason: README score triggers readme auditor

evals.input: Review my README for quality
evals.reason: README review triggers readme auditor

evals.input: Is this ready to ship?
evals.reason: Ready to ship is a listed release trigger

evals.input: Run a pre-release check
evals.reason: Pre-release is a listed release trigger

evals.input: ship check
evals.reason: Ship check is a direct release trigger

evals.input: release ready
evals.reason: Direct release ready trigger

evals.input: Audit the code quality of this project
evals.reason: Generic audit without open-source context should not trigger

evals.input: Deploy this to production
evals.reason: Deployment is unrelated to open-source readiness

evals.input: Set up CI/CD for this repo
evals.reason: CI/CD setup is explicitly a non-trigger

evals.input: Fix this bug in the authentication module
evals.reason: Bug fixing is unrelated

evals.input: Add unit tests for the user service
evals.reason: Adding tests is a development task, not an audit

evals.input: Run a security vulnerability scan on our dependencies
evals.reason: Dependency vulnerability scanning is explicitly out of scope (use npm audit)

evals.input: Review this pull request
evals.reason: Code review is a different task

evals.input: Refactor the database module to use connection pooling
evals.reason: Refactoring is unrelated to open-source readiness

evals.input: Write a README for this project
evals.reason: Writing a README is a creation task, not an audit — readme auditor only scores existing READMEs

evals.input: Create a CHANGELOG for this project
evals.reason: Creating files is a different task from auditing readiness
